notes: Pilot benchmark: 3 paired openings per time bucket (6 actual games per scenario).
The same opening pairs are reused across time buckets; only the search budget changes.
Same random opening is played twice with colors swapped to reduce color bias.
Games are adjudicated by the classic exact lane once empties <= 12.

scenarios.recommendation: mcts-guided가 충분히 분리되어 우세합니다. 낮은 시간대는 mcts-lite, 그 이상은 mcts-guided 배치를 우선 검토할 만합니다.
